HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Detailed Description

Structure representing the integrand of the inter-layer interactions of Green's function.

IntegrandInter IntegrandInter::flatten ( const std::vector< std::tuple< int, int, int > > & indVecTriplet) const
inline

indVecTripletThe vector of index triplets.

◆ flattenVector()

std::vector< std::vector< std::vector< dcmplx > > > IntegrandInter::flattenVector ( const std::vector< std::vector< std::vector< dcmplx > > > & matrix,
const std::vector< std::tuple< int, int, int > > & indVecTriplet ) const
inlineprivate

Extract selected elements from a 3D array into a compact 3D structure.

Parameters
[in]matrixSource 3D array.
[in]indVecTripletList of index triplets (i,j,k) to extract.
Returns
A 3D array where each selected element is stored as a 1×1 "slice" (shape [[value]]), preserving 3D semantics for downstream code.

Each value is obtained via getValue() (bounds-checked) and appended as a 1×1 block to the output.

Warning
Out-of-bounds indices yield a zero value (see getValue()).

Definition at line 498 of file LayeredMediaUtils.h.

Here is the call graph for this function:
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ getValue()

dcmplx IntegrandInter::getValue ( const std::vector< std::vector< std::vector< dcmplx > > > & matrix,
int i,
int j,
int k ) const
inlineprivate

Bounds-checked access to a 3D array element.

Parameters
[in]matrixSource 3D array.
[in]iFirst (0-based) index.
[in]jSecond (0-based) index.
[in]kThird (0-based) index.
Returns
The element at (i,j,k) if all indices are valid; otherwise dcmplx(0,0).
Note
Never throws; returns a default complex for invalid indices.

◆ multiplyVector()

static void IntegrandInter::multiplyVector ( std::vector< std::vector< std::vector< dcmplx > > > & vec,
const dcmplx & scalar )
inlinestaticprivate

In-place scalar multiplication of a 3D array.

Parameters
[in,out]vecTarget 3D array whose elements are scaled.
[in]scalarComplex scaling factor applied to every element.

Traverses all dimensions and multiplies each entry of vec by scalar.

Note
Operates in place; no copies are created.

inline

Parameters
otherThe other IntegrandInter to subtract.
Returns
The resulting IntegrandInter after subtraction.

◆ subtractVector()

static void IntegrandInter::subtractVector ( std::vector< std::vector< std::vector< dcmplx > > > & a,
const std::vector< std::vector< std::vector< dcmplx > > > & b )
inlinestaticprivate

In-place element-wise subtraction of two 3D arrays.

Parameters
[in,out]aLeft-hand 3D array; updated with a-=b for overlapping extents.
[in]bRight-hand 3D array to subtract from a.

Iterates the three nested dimensions and subtracts corresponding entries. If a size mismatch is found at any nesting level, that branch is skipped (or the whole operation returns early at the outermost level).

Note
No allocations are performed; only existing elements in a are modified.

Definition at line 456 of file LayeredMediaUtils.h.
